case_title: REEM ASSAF VS. MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY ASSAF, REEM AS TO DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA THE PEARL & SCHOOL NIGHT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF REEM ASSAF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE LLC REPRESENTED BY JOHN LARNER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS (CONTRACT) RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO AMEND JUDGMENT FILED AUG-23-2021, DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED JUN-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA THE PEARL & SCHOOL NIGHT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JON LARNER, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA THE PEARL & SCHOOL NIGHT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSAF, REEM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA THE PEARL & SCHOOL NIGHT **SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION REGARDING CLERICAL ERROR FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSAF, REEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSAF, REEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORTAR & MASH ONE, LLC DBA THE PEARL & SCHOOL NIGHT $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,615.00, *SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION* *AMENDED* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
